message:
fix(discovery,model): harden JSONL detection and timestamp parsing for edge cases

Discovery changes:
- Handle bare "~" in SourceHint path expansion (was only matching "~/" prefix)
- Make JSONL provider detection resilient to malformed lines by using
  let-else instead of propagating parse failures via ok()?
- Scan up to 50 lines instead of breaking after the first non-matching
  line, since some providers embed metadata lines before session data

Timestamp parsing changes:
- Apply the same seconds-vs-milliseconds threshold logic to float
  timestamps that was already applied to integer timestamps, preventing
  double-multiplication of values already in milliseconds
- Add tests for float-millis in both numeric and string form

Test changes:
- Preserve tool_result-only user messages in Claude Code parser instead
  of dropping them, enabling session resumption with valid tool context
- Update cc_complex fixture expectations (4 -> 6 messages) and relax
  cross-provider empty-content assertion to allow messages with only
  tool_calls or tool_results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,13 +4,13 @@
   "session_id": "cc-complex-001",
   "workspace": "/data/projects/webapp",
   "title": "Refactor the API handler to use async/await",
-  "message_count": 4,
-  "roles": ["User", "Assistant", "Assistant", "Assistant"],
+  "message_count": 6,
+  "roles": ["User", "Assistant", "User", "Assistant", "User", "Assistant"],
   "started_at_present": true,
   "ended_at_present": true,
   "model_name": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929",
   "has_tool_calls": true,
-  "has_tool_results": false,
-  "known_lossy_fields": ["gitBranch", "parentUuid", "isSidechain", "tool_result-only user messages dropped"],
-  "notes": "Complex session with tool_use and tool_result content blocks. User messages c-003 and c-005 contain only tool_result blocks; flatten_content returns empty for these so the reader skips them. The file-history-snapshot entry is also skipped. Final 4 messages: user(c-001), assistant+tool_use(c-002), assistant+tool_use(c-004), assistant(c-006)."
+  "has_tool_results": true,
+  "known_lossy_fields": ["gitBranch", "parentUuid", "isSidechain"],
+  "notes": "Complex session with tool_use and tool_result content blocks. User messages c-003 and c-005 contain only tool_result blocks. These are preserved so the session can resume with valid context. The file-history-snapshot entry is skipped. Final 6 messages: user(c-001), assistant+tool_use(c-002), user+tool_result(c-003), assistant+tool_use(c-004), user+tool_result(c-005), assistant(c-006)."
 }
